name: construction project managers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets.
